item.document_name: Recommendation for Block Cipher Modes of Operation: Methods for Format-Preserving Encryption
item.summary: This recommendation specifies the FF1 method for format-preserving encryption. This method is a mode of operation for an underlying, approved symmetric-key block cipher algorithm.
